criteria.description: Contributing guide references the canonical charter path and no longer contains the retired memory/charter.md substrings.
criteria.evidence: docs/guides/contributing.md:394 now reads '.kittify/charter/charter.md' (commit 599c949f3); grep -rn "memory/charter.md" docs/context docs/guides docs/api spec-driven.md returns empty.

criteria.description: test_current_docs_do_not_publish_memory_charter_path passes with zero offenders across all guarded doc roots.
criteria.evidence: pytest tests/docs/test_current_charter_paths.py -q -> 1 passed (verified live by reviewer, not by inspection).

criteria.description: arch-adversarial CI job split into a matrix of N>=2 parallel shards, following the fast-tests-core-misc sharding pattern.
criteria.evidence: .github/workflows/ci-quality.yml arch-adversarial job strategy.matrix.include expanded from 1 shard (architectural) to 3 (arch_shard_1/2/3); confirmed via live diff review in WP03 review (if: always() unchanged, no needs: edge, no dorny filter if: added).

criteria.description: Shard-to-test assignment is deterministic and marker-driven; re-runs and local reproduction route each test to exactly one shard.
criteria.evidence: arch_shard_1/2/3 markers registered in pytest.ini; tests/_arch_shard_map.py single-source table + tests/conftest.py collection hook; pytest tests/architectural/test_arch_shard_marker_completeness.py -q -> 3 passed. Local reproduction (--collect-only -m arch_shard_N) reproduced identical counts (248/241/317) in both WP02 and WP03 reviews.

criteria.description: Union of all shards executes the entire pre-split arch-adversarial test set; no test dropped, no test double-run (true partition).
criteria.evidence: pytest tests/architectural/test_shard_universe_bounded.py -q -> 2 passed (generalized to explicitly name arch-adversarial, RED proven against pre-split single-shard topology, GREEN after the 3-shard split). Live collection counts: 248+241+317=806, matching the full pre-split selection's 806 tests, zero overlap confirmed via pairwise node-ID diff.

criteria.description: Coverage ownership for the arch pole re-partitioned across shards such that test_coverage_topology_ownership.py passes with the new layout.
criteria.evidence: pytest tests/release/test_coverage_topology_ownership.py -q -> 7 passed, unmodified (confirmed shard-label-agnostic per research.md R4 -- no code change needed).

criteria.description: Committed CI-topology timings fixture updated so the sharded shape is the asserted-canonical shape.
criteria.evidence: tests/release/ci_topology_timings_postshrink.json gained an arch_shard_split block (measured_source_run_id: null, explicitly labeled a structural projection, not a measurement); historical 29.4->14.4min/51% figures preserved. Not test-asserted (narrative artifact); reviewed live in WP03 review for honesty-discipline compliance.

criteria.description: Issue #2397 closed; its acceptance criteria (1-5 in the invariant-safety note) each explicitly re-verified and recorded.
criteria.evidence: kitty-specs/ci-health-charter-path-and-arch-shard-01KWRTB2/acceptance-record.md records all 5 criteria against T012's real guard-suite results; content cross-checked line-by-line against live results by reviewer. Issue #2397 assigned to HiC (stijn-dejongh) per DIR-012 pre-implementation check; to be closed on merge.

negative_invariants.description: The retired memory/charter.md path must not reappear in any of the four guarded doc roots.
negative_invariants.evidence: Empty grep output, verified live in WP01 review (2026-07-05).

negative_invariants.description: arch-adversarial must not regain a needs: edge to fast-tests-core-misc or a dorny filter-group if: gate (would re-serialize/re-blind the pole).
negative_invariants.evidence: 1+ passed, confirmed live in WP03 review; if: always() unchanged, no needs: key added, no dorny filter if: reference added -- confirmed by direct diff review of the job block.
